notes: Ecuador had no confirmed injuries but Pervis Estupiñán was a surprise omission vs Ivory Coast (expected to return) and Kendry Páez carried a knock concern; Beccacece hinted at a formation shift from 3-4-3 to 4-3-3 with Nilson Angulo potentially starting over Alan Minda. Curaçao had a fully fit squad with no injuries or suspensions after the 7-1 Germany loss, though Sontje Hansen was doubted to start and Dick Advocaat made minimal rotation hints beyond a possible Hansen-for-Antonisse swap.
